releases.headline: Initial public release
new: AI Working Setup: set up AI so it understands how you work
Meeting Miner: turn a meeting into decisions, insight, and the next move
LLM Council: pressure-test a decision from five independent angles
Plain AI Explainer: explain a difficult AI concept so a smart beginner gets it
Instagram Carousel Maker: turn one useful idea into an export-ready carousel
Repeated Task to Skill: decide if a repeated task should become a skill, then design it
System skills: start-here, find-a-superpower, whats-new, give-feedback, request-a-superpower
privacy: Native skills work without sending prompts, files, transcripts, or outputs to the companion service
Feedback and requests require payload preview and explicit approval
knownLimitations: A marketplace refresh or new session may be required before an installed update appears
